sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business operations and do not signal immediate financial change.

sentiment.reasoning: The unexpected departure of a COO creates leadership instability and uncertainty regarding operational continuity.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
